summary: Iteration 28 Testing: Stripe Payments and Report Generation Features. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend verification confirmed all UI components working correctly - Report generation dialog with 3 pricing tiers (FREE, $29, $39), Barrister View page with grounds data binding, Export PDF/Word buttons visible.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/payments/prices returns 3 pricing tiers (full_report $29, extensive_report $39, grounds_of_merit $50)
Backend: /api/payments/checkout creates Stripe checkout session with valid URL
Backend: /api/payments/checkout rejects invalid feature types with 400
Backend: /api/cases/{case_id}/reports/{report_id} returns single report with content
Backend: Test case case_cec9b5706fae exists and accessible
Frontend: Case detail page loads with title
Frontend: Reports tab accessible with Generate Report button
Frontend: Report dialog shows 3 types (Quick Summary FREE, Full Detailed $29, Extensive $39)
Frontend: Barrister View button found in ReportsSection (data-testid='barrister-view-btn-*')
Frontend: Export PDF button found in ReportsSection (data-testid='export-pdf-btn-*')
Frontend: Barrister View page loads with GROUNDS OF MERIT section showing grounds data
Frontend: Barrister View header has Export PDF button (data-testid='export-btn')
critical_code_review_comments: stripe_payments.py: Fixed pricing - prices defined server-side, never accepts amounts from frontend (lines 16-20)
stripe_payments.py: Checkout creates payment_transactions record and returns session URL (lines 67-83)
stripe_payments.py: Status endpoint polls Stripe and creates payments record when paid (lines 139-154)
PaymentModal.jsx: Redirects to Stripe checkout URL on click (lines 78-79)
ReportsSection.jsx: Barrister View button with data-testid per report (lines 301-310)
ReportsSection.jsx: Export PDF button with data-testid per report (lines 311-320)
BarristerView.jsx: Grounds data binding fixed - setGrounds(groundsRes.data?.grounds || []) (line 53)
server.py: Report generation supports 3 types - quick_summary, full_detailed, extensive_log
seed_data_creation: Used existing admin user case with 14 reports and 14 grounds
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe checkout uses test key (sk_test_emergent) - creates sessions but actual payment won't complete. Admin email bypasses payment checks for report generation. Session token verified working for authentication. Barrister View page at /cases/{caseId}/reports/{reportId}/barrister with grounds properly displayed.

stripe_payments.payment_modal: PaymentModal.jsx with data-testid='stripe-pay-btn' and Stripe redirect

mocked_api_note: STRIPE CHECKOUT uses test key (sk_test_emergent) - session creation works but actual payment flow won't complete. This is expected for testing environment.
